middles_life: I got written up for browsing WorldNet on the clock — worth it.
Landlord raised rent again; I'm living on vending machine ethics.
I applied to six StaffingPlus listings and heard back from zero.
SSA name change queue moved faster than my promotion pipeline.
I'm listening to dot-com radio while defragging my feelings.
My coworker thinks CorpOS spies on the break room. Probably true.
Trying to explain AXIS decay to my parents was a mistake.
Black Cherry dinged during dinner — it was just Wahoo weather spam.
I'm surviving on coffee, hope, and Regulation 12b footnotes.
My boss thinks 'synergy' is a flavor; I stopped correcting him.
I filed three Mandate forms and gained a hobby (paper cuts).
Meridian keeps sending 'we miss you' like we're dating.
I'm dating someone who still bookmarks GeoCities mirrors.
My car stereo only picks up talk radio about compliance.
I told HR I need ergonomic support; they sent a memo.
I'm moonlighting as a forum moderator for free stress.
My landlord accepts checks, cash, and mild despair.
I tried to expense snacks; Finance sent me a scripture.
I'm on a first-name basis with the FNCB hold music.
My cubicle plant is the only one who understands me.
I rehearse small talk using Wahoo trending topics.
I'm saving for a house; the house is a metaphor (California).
My performance review praised 'presence'; I was on PTO.
I'm learning Excel because fear is a curriculum.
I told AXIS I was busy; it decayed me anyway.
My commute playlist is 40% ads, 60% denial.
I'm writing a novel in Outlook drafts (word count: tragic).
I use JeeMail filters to simulate emotional boundaries.
My gym membership is a donation to guilt.
I'm optimizing sleep for peak snack hours.
My therapist asked about work; I showed her WorldNet.
I'm voting in the office poll: pizza vs. productivity (pizza won).
I laminated my parking pass; it felt like a promotion.
I'm networking at the copier; alliances form near toner.
My five-year plan is 'survive the next patch Tuesday'.
I'm taking PTO to wait for a package (honest).
My group chat is just people forwarding FRA alerts.
I'm practicing smiling for the ID photo retake.
My budget has categories: rent, snacks, and cosmic dread.
I'm filing this week under 'pending' like my soul.
My roommate thinks RapidMart is a personality trait.
I'm building credit and coping mechanisms in parallel.
My calendar says 'busy'; my heart says 'buffering'.
I'm doing Dry January on the dark web (mixed results).
My hobby is reading Terms of Service aloud to plants.
I'm training for a 5K (kilobytes downloaded).
My dream job is 'fewer meetings, more modem sounds'.
I'm collecting CorpOS error codes like trading cards.
My retirement plan is 'win the raffle at Harbor Credit'.
I'm bilingual: English and hold-message English.
My side hustle is correcting people who say 'internet' wrong.
